cards.back: Mi può aiutare, per favore? (mee pwoh ah-yoo-TAH-reh)

cards.front: I have a reservation under the name...
cards.back: Ho una prenotazione a nome... (oh OO-nah preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh ah NOH-meh)

cards.front: Does this train go to Rome?
cards.back: Questo treno va a Roma? (KWEH-stoh TREH-noh vah ah ROH-mah)
Può parlare più lentamente? (pwoh par-LAH-reh pyoo lehn-tah-MEHN-teh)

cards.front: Where can I buy a ticket?
cards.back: Dove posso comprare un biglietto? (DOH-veh POHS-soh kohm-PRAH-reh)

cards.front: How do I get to the center?
cards.back: Come arrivo al centro? (KOH-meh ah-REE-voh ahl CHEN-troh)

cards.front: I would like to book a table

cards.back: A che ora apre? (ah keh OH-rah AH-preh)

cards.front: Can you write it down, please?

cards.back: Ho perso il passaporto (oh PEHR-soh eel pahs-sah-POR-toh)

cards.front: How much does a ticket to Florence cost?
cards.back: Quanto costa un biglietto per Firenze? (KWAHN-toh KOH-stah)
C'è il wifi qui? (cheh eel WEE-fee kwee)
